title: Beyond Biomes
description: EXPERIMENTAL MOD! That adds various biomes to your world!
body: ![Ancient Oak Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RDXsaBTA/images/0058512d41b83bbc4929c1593948e336700be0fb.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! Beyond Biomes is an experimental biome mod that adds various Vanilla-like Biomes, thus far adding the following to enhance your world: - Ancient Oak Forest - Glass Beach - Lava Field - Slime Caves - Blue Crystal Caves - Blood Tundra There aren't any future plans currently, however more biomes may be added later down the line!
